name: SOCI Social
highlight_text: Category: CoMarketing Cloud for multi-location enterprises
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What SOCI Social Does

SOCi is a CoMarketing cloud servkxe for multi-location enterprises. SOCi uses AI and machine learning to provide multi-location brand and business insights.

The platform is particularly well-suited for agencies and resellers and provides robust functionalities. They can unlock opportunities to raise brand awareness with SOCi's white-label reputation management service. What’s more, SOCi supports agencies by strengthening their digital presence across local search and social media.

‍

Key Features

SOCI focuses on robust social engagement with the following features: 

  • White label featuressome text
    • Custom Branding: You can replace SOCi's branding with your own and make your toolbox appear as an in-house solution.
    • Tailored Reports with your brand's look and feel.
    • Customizable Dashboards: Personalize user interfaces to align with your brand's aesthetic.
  • Social media management: SOCi makes it easy to manage social media activities consistently.
  • Local search management: Ensure that all your sites' listings are accurate and consistent, and improve your local search visibility.
  • Review management: Track and respond to all reviews and analyze review sentiment. 

Benefits of SOCI  Social

SOCI’s main benefits include:

  • White Label Benefits:some text
    • Apply your brand aesthetics effortlessly .
    • Create branded reports to strengthen your trustworthiness and project a professional image.
    • Adapt user interfaces and dashboards to align with your brand's design.
  • Effective social media management across various social media platforms.  
  • Streamlined multi-location management: Oversee the marketing efforts for multi-location and multi-family businesses on a single dashboard.
  • Scalability: SOCi supports your marketing efforts as you scale up the business.
  • Use AI, machine learning, and chatbots on social media platforms to promote audience engagement. 
  • Use comprehensive analytics and reporting to monitor performance and gain insights.  
  • Interact with the SOCi platform on a 24/7 basis with the SOCi App

Pricing

Request a demo to learn about SOCi’s customized plans.

Pros

✅White label features

✅User-friendly platform.

✅Mobile App.

Cons

🚫Complex for new users

🚫Limited integrations
